hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your input" with title "Wamp Dev" sound name "Submarine"'

bash -c 'branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null) && status=$(git status --short 2>/dev/null) && echo "[wamp] Branch: $branch" && if [ -n "$status" ]; then echo "[wamp] Uncommitted:"; echo "$status"; else echo "[wamp] Working tree clean"; fi'
